description: Testing display properties of RichTextBox/Markdown in both add and edit forms

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of RichTextBox/Markdown item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank
+ Place holder value
+ Type of Richtextbox
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of RichTextBox/Markdown item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: DB's value

description: Testing basic control functionality of RichTextBox including cursor, tab order and resizing

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of cusor in RichTextbox
expected_result: Appear the cursor when focus into RichTextbox as normal

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click "Tab" key on keyboard to Check tab order of item
expected_result: Tab order is correct as designed

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check ability to resize of richtextbox
expected_result:
+ Richtextbox can not resize
[Base on spec]
(If richtextbox can resize following spec, Check operation of richtextbox when resized form)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check actions in RichTextbox:
+ Cut
+ Copy
+ Paste
+ Paste Special
+ Undo
+ Redo
+ Find
+ Find and Replace
+ Select All
expected_result: All actions are performed correctly as normal

description: Testing text formatting capabilities and paragraph alignment options

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check format functions for text:
+ Font
+ Size
+ Text color
+ Background color
+ Bold
+ Italics
+ Underline
+ Strikethrough
+ Superscript
+ Subscript
+ Style of text
+ Format heading
expected_result: Text displays corresponding chosen format correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check align of paragraph:
+ Left
+ Right
+ Center
+ Justify
expected_result: Paragraph is aligned correctly as selected option

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Indent of paragraph when:
+ Descrease Indent
+ Increase Indent
expected_result: Paragraph is Descrease/Increase Indent correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check breakline Paragraph
expected_result: Parapraph is broken to 2 lines

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check break page
expected_result: Data is broken to 2 pages

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Margin of paragraph:
+ From left
+ From right
expected_result: Paragraph is margined from left/right correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check quote a paragraph
expected_result: Paragraph displays in quote format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check action Copy Formatting
expected_result: All formatting is copied and saved to cache

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check action Remove format
expected_result: All formatting is removed successfully

description: Testing insertion and editing of various elements in RichTextBox

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check action Add/Remove:
+ Bullet
+ Numbering
expected_result: Bullet/Numbering is inserted or removed correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check action insert:
+ Checkbox
+ Radio button
+ Textbox
+ Text Area
+ Pulldown
+ Button
+ Image button
+ Insert/Edit/Remove Link
+ Flag
+ Image
+ Flash
+ Separator Line
+ Emotion
+ Symbols
+ Embed media
expected_result:
Selected item is inserted successfully
All of operation of items after inserted are normal.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check action insert Hidden field
expected_result: Hidden field is inserted successfully and not displays in preview/view mode

description: Testing different view modes and screen behaviors of RichTextBox

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check Preview mode
expected_result: All formatting data is displays correctly in preview mode

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check HTML code mode
expected_result: All forrmattin data displays in HTML mode correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check 2 modes displays at the same time
expected_result: Editting mode and Preview mode displays correctly at the same time

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check Minimize/Maximize screen
expected_result: Minimize/Maximize screen successfully, all data and formatting has no change

description: Testing table functionality including insertion, editing and formatting

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check insert table successfully
expected_result: Table is inseated successfully corresponding number of row, column

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check edit table successfully
expected_result: Table is editable, add/remove row/column/data successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check formatting in table
expected_result: Data/Text on table can be formated normally like normal text/paragraph

description: Testing additional features like printing, templates, and language settings

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check create new page
expected_result: New blank page is created

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check action print
expected_result: Preview print page displays correctly formartting data

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check all sample template displays and can be used
expected_result: Sample template format displays correctly and enable to use

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check setting language
expected_result: Language can be set to text successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check Spelling function
expected_result: Checkspelling work correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check Help
expected_result:
Navigating to Help popup/screen
[Base on spec]

expected_result: Insert successfully, no error

expected_result: All formatting is applied

test_view_points.viewpoint: Input and format => Preview => Save => Check displays on RichTextBox/Markdown again

Markdown

Check input multi data with multi formatting:
- text
- number
- Special characters
- Enter character
- table/image/media
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input multi lines when:
+ Not display vertical scroll
+ Display vertical scroll
expected_result:
Process successfully with inputed value
Vertical scroll operates normally

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input Max/Mix value
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input max valid value:
+ Without Enter character
+ Has Enter character
(includes all valid character types)
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

description: Testing error handling for invalid inputs

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input < Min lenght value
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input > Max length value
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position
